column1: You ... speak to a prisoner in a foreign language.
You aren't ... go for a walk at night.
You ... get your feet wet, because you might fall ill.
She was feeling unwell the whole day yesterday, she ... have gone to the office.
You don't remember what I said, you ... have listened more carefully.
You ... have told anyone, that was a secret.
You ... have missed the lessons, you failed the test.
